loginSubtitle: Secure access to your elections and ballots
signupSubtitle: Join as a voter or election creator
botConfirm: Please confirm you are not a bot.

chrome.leftSub: Verified voter registration, anonymous ballots, and role-based dashboards for voters, election creators, and administrators.
chrome.feat1Desc: Sensitive actions use modern TLS and Supabase Auth.
chrome.feat2Desc: Administrative actions can be logged for review.
chrome.feat3Desc: Voters and election creators start here; admins are provisioned separately.

loginForm.welcomeSub: Sign in with your email and password.
loginForm.hint: Select the role you registered with, then sign in. You will only enter that role's dashboard.
loginForm.adminNote: Super Admin accounts are provisioned by the operator.
loginForm.roleMismatch: This account is not registered as {{selected}}. It is registered as {{registered}}.

adminLogin.title: Administrator sign in
adminLogin.subtitle: Restricted platform console — not for voters or election creators.
adminLogin.hint: Use the Super Admin account provisioned by the platform operator. Voters and creators should use the public sign-in page.
adminLogin.backToPublicLogin: Voter or creator? Public sign in
adminLogin.notAdminAccount: This account is not a Super Admin. Use the public sign-in page for your role.

signupForm.title: Create your account
signupForm.sub: Join FortressVote — verify your email after signup.
signupForm.terms: I agree to the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy
signupForm.pwEmpty: Enter a password to check strength
signupForm.termsRequired: Please accept the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.
signupForm.nameRequired: First and last name are required.
signupForm.purposeRequired: Election purpose is required for creator registration.
signupForm.placeholderPurpose: Describe the election you plan to run…
signupForm.adminNote: Super Admin accounts are created by the platform operator.

passwordReset.title: Reset access
passwordReset.subEmail: Enter your email and we will send a 6-digit verification code.
passwordReset.subCode: Enter the code from your email to continue.
passwordReset.codeSent: If an account exists for {{email}}, you will receive a 6-digit code shortly.
passwordReset.codeFailed: Invalid or expired code. Try again or request a new code.
passwordReset.success: Password updated. Please sign in with your new password.
passwordReset.needCode: Enter the verification code from your email on the forgot password page first.
passwordReset.linkExpired: Reset link expired or invalid. Request a new code instead.

errors.rateLimit: Email sending limit reached. Configure SMTP in Supabase (see docs/AUTH_SETUP.md), wait, then try again.
errors.emailSend: Could not send verification email. Check Supabase Auth → SMTP and sender settings. See docs/AUTH_SETUP.md.
